name: Sky Team
description: Sky Team is Luc Rémond's tense Spiel-des-Jahres-2024-winning two-player cooperative — one pilot, one co-pilot, eight nail-biting minutes to land an airliner. Roll dice in secret each round, then place them silently onto cockpit slots (engines, axis, flaps, gear, brakes) to coordinate the descent without crashing into mountains, traffic, or your own clock. A campaign of progressively brutal airports keeps the cabin lights low.
